events.name: V.I.PASSHOLDER Summer Days
events.description:
Disney's passholder summer umbrella, centered at EPCOT: the Passholder Lounge at Restaurant Marrakesh, a mystery-character meet at the Magic Eye Theater, increased dining discounts, and new merch (Buzz & Woody magnet, popcorn bucket, tumbler).

Popcorn buckets and dining discounts run at the other parks too. See your **Perks tab** filtered to Disney for the full list.

events.name: Summer Nights
events.description: Stay Longer. Play Later! Celebrate all summer long with the ultimate evening thrills that light up the park with extended hours, non-stop dazzling entertainment and special summer eats & treats!

events.name: Summer at Universal Orlando
events.description: Universal Studios Florida's blockbuster-movie summer, included with admission: the Universal Mega Movie Parade nightly at 7 PM, plus the Spielberg Summer Blockbusters exhibit, Jaws-inspired fun in Amity, and a Minions & Monsters character meet.

events.name: The Ultimate Playdate
events.description: You're invited to The Ultimate Playdate! Delight in early access to Turi’s Kid Cove before the park officially opens, so you and your little ones get a head start on the fun-filled adventure that awaits.

events.name: Coca-Cola FIFA World Cup 2026 Fan Zone
events.description: Watch World Cup matches on the big screen in the Coca-Cola Fan Zone. Select dates during the tournament; included with admission.

events.name: Electric Ocean
events.description: SeaWorld Orlando's summer nighttime umbrella — stay late to immerse yourself in exotic worlds of light and music, with the IGNITE Fireworks Spectacular & all-new drone show as the 360-degree nightly finale.

events.name: Red, White & BBQ
events.description: To celebrate America250, we're savoring BBQ flavors from around the country featuring mouth-watering meats from the most iconic BBQ regions across the US.

events.name: Pass Member Picnic — Christmas in July
events.short: Pass Member Picnic — Christmas in July
events.description: Pass Members celebrate Christmas in July at an exclusive picnic at Gwazi Pavilion, 11 AM - 2 PM. Festive entertainment, seasonal treats, and holiday cheer with a summertime twist. $15 in advance, $10 day-of at Gwazi Pavilion. Limited availability; rain or shine.

events.name: Bier Fest Brews & BBQ
events.description: Sip and savor seasonal brew offerings and new beer-inspired recipes at Bier Fest Brews & BBQ.

events.name: Back to Hogwarts
events.description: Celebrating the timeframe students traditionally return to Hogwarts, with limited-time offerings across The Wizarding World of Harry Potter in both parks during the first Harry Potter film's 25th anniversary year.

events.name: Mickey's Not So Scary Halloween Party
events.description: Separately ticketed Halloween party at Magic Kingdom on 38 select nights, 7 PM – midnight (event-ticket holders can enter at 4 PM). On event nights, MK closes to non-event guests at 6 PM — no Happily Ever After fireworks or Disney Starlight Nighttime Parade for day guests on those evenings. 2026 nights: Aug 7, 11, 14, 18, 21, 23, 25, 28, 30; Sept 1, 4, 8, 11, 13, 15, 18, 20, 22, 24, 25, 27, 29; Oct 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 9, 13, 15, 16, 18, 22, 23, 25, 27, 29, 31. Oct 31 is sold out but the park-closure effect still applies.

events.name: Passholder Appreciation Days
events.description: Six weeks of exclusive passholder offers, special events, and giveaways across Universal Orlando.

events.name: National Roller Coaster Day Tour
events.description: Celebrate National Roller Coaster Day at SeaWorld Orlando with an exclusive behind-the-scenes tour!

events.name: Food & Wine Festival
events.description: Festival booths along World Showcase. Festival passport in MDX day-of. Included with EPCOT admission.

events.name: Halloween Horror Nights 35
events.description: Universal's annual after-hours horror event. Separately ticketed — USF closes at 5 PM on event nights, so day visits get cut short.

events.name: Halloween Spooktacular
events.description: At SeaWorld Spooktacular, trick-or-treat and meet silly Halloween characters during this family-friendly daytime event.

events.name: Halloween Spooktacular (BGT daytime)
events.description: Celebrate Halloween with trick-or-treating and more during Busch Gardens' Halloween Spooktacular event.

events.name: Pass Member Friends and Family Night
events.short: Pass Member Friends and Family Night
events.description: Aquatica Orlando Annual Pass Members are invited to join us at Annual Pass Member Friends & Family Nights! Enjoy the most water slides in Orlando, exclusive discounts on merchandise, meals, and drinks. Plus, bring your friends and family with discounted event guest tickets.

events.name: Pass Member Slide Nights
events.description: A Pass Member Exclusive Event! Enjoy culinary offerings and special priced guest tickets!

events.name: Howl-O-Scream
events.description: Busch Gardens' annual scare event. Separately ticketed — BG closes at 6 PM on event nights, so day visits get cut short.

events.name: Hispanic and Latin American Heritage Month
events.description: Disney's cross-park celebration of Hispanic and Latin American cultures — lively performances, Mirabel and Bruno character meets from *Encanto*, Music of Mexico processional, the Viva Gaia Street Band at Animal Kingdom's Discovery Island, the Mexican Folk Art Gallery and *Dia de los Muertos* art exhibit at EPCOT, and seasonal menu items.

events.name: Howl-O-Scream
events.description: A new terror has surfaced, and there’s nowhere to hide. Howl-O-Scream has washed ashore at SeaWorld Orlando, and this time, the fear is everywhere. A separately-ticketed event.
